_comment: Allowlist of license-cleared generator voice models. `generate` only uses models listed here unless --allow-unverified is passed. Each entry is diligence done ONCE, then enforced forever by the ship gate. Adding a model means you have read its license AND its training-data license and confirmed commercial + redistributable rights. NOT legal advice — good-faith reads of published model cards; confirm before a commercial release.

models.voice_traits: US English, female, single speaker, trained from scratch on public-domain data
models.notes: Clean transitive chain: rhasspy/piper-voices repo is MIT; this voice trained FROM SCRATCH on public-domain LJ Speech (not fine-tuned from a restricted base like blizzard/lessac). Good default female base. Download .onnx + .onnx.json where grunt's --model can find them. Verified vs published MODEL_CARD 2026-06; re-confirm before commercial release.
PLACEHOLDER template for adding a true CC0 voice (e.g. a male base). Do NOT generate from this id until replaced — its model_file does not exist.
